successful_alumni.ranking_basis: Curated from official Caltech Alumni Distinguished Alumni Award profiles and official Caltech Alumni Techer stories/news pages, prioritizing person-specific profiles with explicit degree-year evidence and strong evidence of post-graduation impact.
successful_alumni.source_summary: Extracted from official Caltech Alumni pages on alumni.caltech.edu, primarily Distinguished Alumni Award profiles plus recent Techer stories and news features.

items.name: Fei-Fei Li
items.bio: Caltech Alumni says Fei-Fei Li (MS '02, PhD '05) chose Caltech for its interdisciplinarity and is helping guide AI technology toward broad human benefit as a leading computer vision and artificial intelligence researcher.
items.description: AI leader and computer vision researcher.
items.confirmation_label: Official Caltech Alumni Distinguished Alumni Award profile
items.evidence_quality_note: Official Caltech Alumni person-specific award profile with explicit degree-year evidence and substantive career summary.

items.name: Bob Behnken
items.bio: Caltech Alumni says NASA astronaut Bob Behnken (MS '93, PhD '97) was honored for an accomplished career across three space missions, including the first crewed orbital flight aboard a commercially developed spacecraft in 2020.
items.confirmation_label: Official Caltech Alumni Distinguished Alumni Award profile
items.evidence_quality_note: Official Caltech Alumni person-specific award profile with explicit degree-year evidence and substantive career summary.

items.name: David Brin
items.bio: Caltech Alumni says David Brin (BS '73) was recognized for enduring excellence in storytelling and for examining how change, science, and technology affect the human condition in his New York Times-bestselling science fiction novels.
items.confirmation_label: Official Caltech Alumni Distinguished Alumni Award profile
items.evidence_quality_note: Official Caltech Alumni person-specific award profile with explicit degree-year evidence and substantive career summary.

items.name: Eugene Myers
items.bio: Caltech Alumni says Eugene Myers (BS '75), director of the Max Planck Institute of Molecular Cell Biology and Genetics, made a transformative impact on bioinformatics by creating the basic local alignment search tool and helping drive genome analysis.
items.confirmation_label: Official Caltech Alumni Distinguished Alumni Award profile
items.evidence_quality_note: Official Caltech Alumni person-specific award profile with explicit degree-year evidence and substantive career summary.

items.name: Laurie Leshin
items.bio: Caltech Alumni says Laurie Leshin (MS '89, PhD '95), president of Worcester Polytechnic Institute, was lauded for barrier-breaking leadership at WPI and previous leadership roles at NASA and Rensselaer Polytechnic Institute.
items.description: University president and former NASA leader.
items.confirmation_label: Official Caltech Alumni Distinguished Alumni Award profile
items.evidence_quality_note: Official Caltech Alumni person-specific award profile with explicit degree-year evidence and substantive career summary.

items.name: Charles Elachi
items.bio: Caltech Alumni says Charles Elachi (MS '69, PhD '71), Caltech professor emeritus and former JPL director, was recognized for distinguished leadership in space exploration and planetary science.
items.description: Former JPL director and planetary scientist.
items.confirmation_label: Official Caltech Alumni Distinguished Alumni Award profile
items.evidence_quality_note: Official Caltech Alumni person-specific award profile with explicit degree-year evidence and substantive career summary.

items.name: Louise Chow
items.bio: Caltech Alumni says Louise Chow (PhD '73) developed pioneering electron microscopy methods that enabled the Nobel Prize-winning discovery of split genes, one of molecular biology's landmark breakthroughs.
items.description: Molecular biologist tied to the discovery of split genes.
items.confirmation_label: Official Caltech Alumni Distinguished Alumni Award profile
items.evidence_quality_note: Official Caltech Alumni person-specific award profile with explicit degree-year evidence and substantive career summary.

items.name: Nader Engheta
items.bio: Caltech Alumni says Nader Engheta (MS '79, PhD '82), the H. Nedwill Ramsey Professor at the University of Pennsylvania, is recognized for pioneering advances in optics including optical nanocircuits and metamaterials.
items.confirmation_label: Official Caltech Alumni Distinguished Alumni Award profile
items.evidence_quality_note: Official Caltech Alumni person-specific award profile with explicit degree-year evidence and substantive career summary.

items.name: Timothy M. Swager
items.bio: Caltech Alumni says Timothy M. Swager (PhD '88) earned recognition for groundbreaking advances in molecular electronics and chemical sensing that produced a new generation of highly sensitive devices.
items.description: Chemist known for molecular electronics and sensing.
items.confirmation_label: Official Caltech Alumni Distinguished Alumni Award profile
items.evidence_quality_note: Official Caltech Alumni person-specific award profile with explicit degree-year evidence and substantive career summary.

items.name: Bette Korber
items.bio: Caltech Alumni says Bette Korber (PhD '88), a laboratory fellow at Los Alamos National Laboratory, is lauded for pioneering virology research and computational vaccine design, especially in HIV science.
items.confirmation_label: Official Caltech Alumni Distinguished Alumni Award profile
items.evidence_quality_note: Official Caltech Alumni person-specific award profile with explicit degree-year evidence and substantive career summary.

items.name: Barbara Burger
items.bio: Caltech Alumni says Barbara Burger (PhD '87) was honored for a long career as a business leader at Chevron and for helping advance technology ventures and innovation.
items.confirmation_label: Official Caltech Alumni Distinguished Alumni Award profile
items.evidence_quality_note: Official Caltech Alumni person-specific award profile with explicit degree-year evidence and substantive career summary.

items.name: William "Bill" Coughran
items.bio: Caltech Alumni says William "Bill" Coughran (BS '75, MS '75) was recognized for his influential work as a Silicon Valley executive, mentor, and investor who helped ambitious startups become transformative companies.
items.description: Silicon Valley executive, mentor, and investor.
items.confirmation_label: Official Caltech Alumni Distinguished Alumni Award profile
items.evidence_quality_note: Official Caltech Alumni person-specific award profile with explicit degree-year evidence and substantive career summary.

items.name: Kenneth Suslick
items.bio: Caltech Alumni says Kenneth Suslick (BS '74), professor emeritus of chemistry at the University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign, was recognized for profound contributions to sonochemistry and materials chemistry.
items.confirmation_label: Official Caltech Alumni Distinguished Alumni Award profile
items.evidence_quality_note: Official Caltech Alumni person-specific award profile with explicit degree-year evidence and substantive career summary.

items.name: Sudhir Jain
items.bio: Caltech Alumni says Sudhir Kumar Jain (MS '80, PhD '83), vice chancellor of Banaras Hindu University, is recognized as a preeminent earthquake engineer in India for research, advocacy, and public service that has saved lives.
items.confirmation_label: Official Caltech Alumni Distinguished Alumni Award profile
items.evidence_quality_note: Official Caltech Alumni person-specific award profile with explicit degree-year evidence and substantive career summary.

items.name: Kam-Yin Lau
items.bio: Caltech Alumni says Kam-Yin Lau (BS '78, MS '78, PhD '81), professor emeritus at UC Berkeley, was honored for innovations in and commercialization of laser diode technology and photonics.
items.description: Photonics innovator and UC Berkeley professor emeritus.
items.confirmation_label: Official Caltech Alumni Distinguished Alumni Award profile
items.evidence_quality_note: Official Caltech Alumni person-specific award profile with explicit degree-year evidence and substantive career summary.

items.name: Karen Maples
items.bio: Caltech Alumni says Karen Maples (BS '76) served as an obstetrician and gynecologist at Kaiser Permanente for 38 years and was recognized as one of Caltech's first Black female undergraduates and a lifelong mentor and advocate.
items.confirmation_label: Official Caltech Alumni Distinguished Alumni Award profile
items.evidence_quality_note: Official Caltech Alumni person-specific award profile with explicit degree-year evidence and substantive career summary.

items.name: Bill Gross
items.bio: Caltech Alumni says Bill Gross (BS '81) is building a new search startup aimed at protecting creators in the age of AI after earlier helping shape the modern search industry.
items.confirmation_label: Official Caltech Alumni Techer story
items.evidence_quality_note: Official Caltech Alumni Techer story with explicit degree-year evidence and substantive post-graduation summary.

items.name: Tammy Ma
items.bio: Caltech Alumni says Tammy Ma (BS '05) directs the Livermore Institute for Fusion Technology at Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory and is trying to make inertial fusion energy real.
items.description: Fusion-energy physicist and national lab leader.
items.confirmation_label: Official Caltech Alumni Techer news profile
items.evidence_quality_note: Official Caltech Alumni Techer news page with explicit degree-year evidence and substantive post-graduation summary.

items.name: Lauren Edgar
items.bio: Caltech Alumni says Lauren Edgar (MS '09, PhD '13) trained on Mars rover missions, helped plan the first crewed lunar landing for Artemis, and was selected for NASA's 2025 astronaut candidate class.
items.confirmation_label: Official Caltech Alumni Techer news profile
items.evidence_quality_note: Official Caltech Alumni Techer news page with explicit degree-year evidence and substantive post-graduation summary.

items.name: Adam Subhas
items.bio: Caltech Alumni says Adam Subhas (PhD '17), an oceanographer at Woods Hole Oceanographic Institution, is leading a first-of-its-kind ocean alkalinity experiment to study carbon capture and acidification.
items.description: Oceanographer leading a novel carbon-removal experiment.
items.confirmation_label: Official Caltech Alumni Techer news profile
items.evidence_quality_note: Official Caltech Alumni Techer news page with explicit degree-year evidence and substantive post-graduation summary.
